use_cases: Responsive sidebar navigation that can be toggled open or closed
Main navigation for web applications with collapsible menu
Dashboard navigation with avatar and menu items
ai_summary: Airbnb-inspired toggle sidebar navigation component with a responsive flex layout. Features a decorative jagged line visualization as background element and a clean nav list with avatar, menu items. The sidebar can be toggled via state control and adapts to container dimensions using @visx/responsive for proper scaling across devices.
